# Reviewer Notes

This file keeps searchable reviewer handles and coordination notes for future PR preparation.

## Known reviewer handles

- `MoonCanNotDrink`: confirmed GitHub login referenced during PR coordination on 2026-03-20.

## Notes

- Search for `reviewer`, `reviewers`, or `MoonCanNotDrink` to find this file quickly.
- If PR automation needs an actual GitHub reviewer assignment, confirm the exact GitHub login first.
